title: Botão Resumo de Leaks por Sessão (Consolidação de Todas as Análises)
plan: Analyze existing LeakFinder output structure and health_score computation in src/analyzers/leak_finder.py

Create src/analyzers/leak_summary.py with LeakSummaryAnalyzer class that wraps LeakFinder, computes session grade (A+ to F from health_score), extracts top 3 priority leaks, and organizes all leaks by category
Add grade_to_letter() and grade_to_color() helper functions for A+ through F mapping
Integrate LeakSummaryAnalyzer into analytics pipeline (src/analytics_pipeline.py) to store consolidated summary
Create prepare_leak_summary_data() function in src/web/data.py to prepare template data
Update cash route in src/web/routes/cash.py to pass leak summary data to overview template
Add 'Resumo de Leaks' button to src/web/templates/cash/overview.html with prominent placement
Create leak summary modal HTML in overview.html following US-018/US-019 modal pattern (hidden overlay div)

Implement modal sections: Session Grade card with color-coded badge, Top 3 Priorities cards with cost/suggestion, All Leaks by Category with expandable sections showing severity/description/impact/study suggestion
Add CSS styles to src/web/static/css/style.css for grade badge, leak summary modal, category sections, severity indicators
Add JavaScript handlers in overview.html for modal open/close, category toggle, ESC key close, backdrop blur animation
Replicate implementation for tournament overview template (src/web/templates/tournament/overview.html)
Run quality gates: typecheck, lint, tests, build verification
